overview: Vasavi College of Engineering (VCE), Hyderabad is a premier private engineering college established in 1981 by the Vasavi Academy of Education. It is an autonomous institution affiliated to Osmania University and approved by AICTE. VCE has been ranked in the 201-300 band in NIRF India Rankings 2025. The college is known for its strong academic culture, consistent placement track record, and focus on holistic student development. VCE is one of the most sought-after private engineering colleges in Telangana.
accreditation: NAAC A+ Grade, NBA Accredited (8 programs), AICTE approved, Osmania University affiliated (Autonomous)

admissions.admissionProcess: B.E.: 70% seats through TG EAPCET counselling (TSCHE convenor quota), 30% management quota. M.E.: GATE score based admission. MBA: TSICET counselling.

campus.specialNote: VCE is located at Ibrahimbagh, near the historic Golconda Fort, in a prime area of Hyderabad with excellent connectivity.
